totalSleepTime_min.calculation: Duration of epochs scored as N1, N2, N3, or REM

sleepPeriod_min.description: Time from sleep onset to final awakening
sleepPeriod_min.calculation: Final wake time - Sleep onset time

sleepOnsetLatency_min.description: Lights off to first epoch of any sleep stage
sleepOnsetLatency_min.aasm_definition: Time from lights out to first epoch of any sleep stage

remLatency_min.description: Sleep onset to first REM epoch
remLatency_min.aasm_definition: Time from sleep onset to first epoch of REM sleep

wakeAfterSleepOnset_min.calculation: Sum of wake epochs between sleep onset and final awakening

arousals_per_hour.description: Arousal Index - arousals per hour of sleep

obstructiveApnea.aasm_definition: ≥90% drop in airflow for ≥10s with continued respiratory effort

centralApnea.aasm_definition: ≥90% drop in airflow for ≥10s without respiratory effort

mixedApnea.aasm_definition: Apnea with both central and obstructive components

hypopnea.aasm_definition: ≥30% drop in airflow for ≥10s with ≥3% desaturation or arousal

rera.aasm_definition: Respiratory Effort-Related Arousal - increased effort with arousal

plmArousals_per_hour.description: PLMs with associated arousals per hour

parseEDF.description: Parse EDF file to extract sleep data

convertToWIASleep.description: Transform PSG report to WIA-SLEEP format
